tasks.title: Custom tool discovery scans TOOL.md instead of .ts/.js
tasks.description: Modify DirectoryScanner::scan_tools() in crates/config/src/directory_scanner.rs:226-229 to change file extension filter from TOOL.md to .ts, .js, .mts, .cts and parse JavaScript/TypeScript tool definitions
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify DirectoryScanner::scan_tools() accepts .ts/.js/.mts/.cts extensions
AddIntegrationTest: verify tool definitions in TypeScript/JavaScript files are correctly parsed
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing TOOL.md scanning still works for legacy files

tasks.title: Discovered tools recorded in config but NOT registered with ToolRegistry
tasks.description: Create registration flow in crates/tools/src/discovery.rs:230-248 with register_custom_tools() that registers with ToolRegistry so discovered custom tools appear in tool listing and are executable through standard tool pipeline
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify register_custom_tools() adds tools to ToolRegistry
AddIntegrationTest: verify discovered custom tools appear in tool listing
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing tool registration flow is not broken

tasks.title: PluginToolAdapter exists but no mechanism to register plugin tools

test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify register_tool() adds plugin tool to registry
AddIntegrationTest: verify export_as_tools() exports all plugin tools

tasks.impl_notes: register_tool() at crates/plugin/src/lib.rs:268, export_as_tools() at lib.rs:576, register_tools_in_registry() at lib.rs:821

tasks.title: ACP E2E Connection Test

test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify ACP server starts successfully with ACP enabled
AddIntegrationTest: verify AcpTransportClient establishes TCP/WebSocket connection
AddIntegrationTest: verify ACP handshake completes without errors
AddIntegrationTest: verify send/receive message exchange works end-to-end

tasks.title: Remove Duplicate directory_scanner.rs
